name: io.github.JuhongPark/pronunciation
title: Pronunciation & Voice Coach
description: Local MCP voice coach for Codex, Claude, and other MCP clients with English feedback.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_PRONUNCIATION_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: faster-whisper model size. Default: base.en. Options: tiny.en, base.en, small.en, medium.en, large-v3, large-v3-turbo.

environmentVariables.name: HF_HUB_CACHE
environmentVariables.description: Override Hugging Face Hub cache directory where Whisper weights are stored.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_PRONUNCIATION_PRELOAD
environmentVariables.description: Set to 0, false, no, or off to disable background Whisper model preload during registry inspection or Docker smoke tests.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_PRONUNCIATION_AUDIO_RETENTION
environmentVariables.description: Temporary WAV retention policy. Use session to delete recordings when the server exits, or keep for manual inspection.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_PRONUNCIATION_INPUT_DEVICE
environmentVariables.description: Optional sounddevice input device index or name. Leave unset to use the system default microphone.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_PRONUNCIATION_VAD_SENSITIVITY
environmentVariables.description: Voice activity detection sensitivity for native recording. Options: low, normal, high. Default: normal.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_PRONUNCIATION_SILENCE_DURATION
environmentVariables.description: Seconds of silence before auto-stop on native recording. Clamped to 0.3-5.0 seconds. Default: 1.5.

environmentVariables.name: TORCH_HOME
environmentVariables.description: Override PyTorch cache directory for optional wav2vec2 forced-alignment weights.
